steps.t: King Elessar is in the Palace of the Swan, King's Gondor.
King Elessar has given you a choice of road north into the Blackroot Vale: either to fight your way through Tarlang's Crown, or to take the longer, sa…
King Elessar suggested that you travel to the Hill of Erech in the Blackroot Vale, in King's Gondor.
Legolas stands at the base of the Hill of Erech.
